name: wp-plugin-dev
description: Develop WordPress plugins following official WordPress coding standards, security best practices, and WordPress.org directory guidelines. Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, scaffold, or develop a WordPress plugin — including standard plugins (settings pages, CPTs, shortcodes), WooCommerce extensions, Gutenberg block plugins, or REST API / headless plugins. Also trigger when the user mentions "WordPress plugin", "WP plugin", asks to build a feature as a plugin, wants to add admi...
